title: Regulatory Sandbox Innovation License
summary: Allows research and pre-commercial testing of emerging wireless technologies and services, including passive IoT and other connected-device use cases, subject to TRA application, review, fee, and temporary licence approval.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Temporary licensing framework for testing advanced wireless technologies.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Temporary licensing framework for testing advanced telecom technologies.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law and TRA licensing framework
